entities.name: Large Employers
entities.context: Market segment facing internal mobility and retention challenges

entities.name: HR Departments
entities.context: Organizational function lacking tools to match employees to internal roles

entities.name: Internal Mobility
entities.context: Process of moving employees to internal roles; described as manual and broken

entities.name: Internal Growth Paths
entities.context: Career advancement visibility within organizations; lack causes attrition

entities.name: Retention
entities.context: Keeping existing employees; noted as less costly than external recruiting

entities.name: Recruiting
entities.context: External hiring process; more expensive than retention

relationships.context: Core problem large employers face is broken internal mobility
HR lacks tools to execute internal mobility effectively
Employees leave when they don't see internal growth paths
Retention costs less than recruiting externally
Functional internal mobility enables visible growth paths
